steps.title: Find the plant difference
steps.content: The student wants to emphasize a difference between Pipturus albidus and Psidium cattleyanum. The notes give that contrast: Pipturus albidus is a native species, while Psidium cattleyanum is a non-native species.

steps.title: Contrast native status
steps.content: The matching choice names both plants and highlights that only the former is native. Choice A mentions only Psidium cattleyanum, Choice C describes the study method, and Choice D emphasizes a similarity: both plants appeared in bird fecal samples. The answer is B.
